description: Create a client onboarding folder structure for a new client named 'Meridian Holdings Inc.' under the 'Projects' workspace. Establish a root folder named 'Meridian-Holdings' (Title: 'Meridian Holdings Inc.', Description: 'Client onboarding folder for Meridian Holdings Inc. - Account opened 2024.') containing four sub-folders: 'Identification' (Title: 'Identification Documents', Desc: 'Government-issued IDs, corporate registration certificates, and beneficial ownership records.'), 'Contracts' (Title: 'Contracts and Agreements', Desc: 'Signed service agreements, NDAs, engagement letters, and amendments.'), 'Correspondence' (Title: 'Client Correspondence', Desc: 'Emails, letters, meeting notes, and official communications with the client.'), and 'Compliance' (Title: 'Compliance Records', Desc: 'KYC documentation, AML screening results, risk assessments, and regulatory filings.'). Within each sub-folder, include a Note document named 'INDEX' with a relevant title and HTML content describing the folder's purpose. Export a summary file to /home/ga/onboarding_summary.json including the client name, root path, list of subfolders, and total count of documents created.
